movie.actors: Jerry Seinfeld, Renée Zellweger, Matthew Broderick, Patrick Warburton
movie.awards: Nominated for 1 Golden Globe. Another 1 win & 14 nominations.
movie.plot: Barry B. Benson, a bee just graduated from college, is disillusioned at his lone career choice: making honey. On a special trip outside the hive, Barry's life is saved by Vanessa, a florist in New York City. As their relationship blossoms, he discovers humans actually eat honey, and subsequently decides to sue them.
movie.title: Bee Movie
movie.writer: Jerry Seinfeld, Spike Feresten, Barry Marder, Andy Robin, Chuck Martin (additional screenplay material), Tom Papa (additional screenplay material)
